MATH 124 Calculus with Analytic Geometry I (5) NSc, RSN
First course in calculus. Prerequisite: placement or MATH 120.

MATH 125 Calculus with Analytic Geometry II (5) NSc, RSN
Second course in calculus. Prerequisite: MATH 124.

MATH 126 Calculus with Analytic Geometry III (5) NSc, RSN
Third course in calculus. Prerequisite: MATH 125.

STAT 311 Elements of Statistical Methods (5) NSc, RSN
Statistical methods. Prerequisite: MATH 124.

ENGL 131 Composition: Exposition (5) A&H, C
Study and practice of exposition.

MATH 999 Out of Sample (1)
Must not survive the selected-course filter.
